title: George Cricket Club hosts business & social cricket league
description: CRICKET NEWS - On 27 and 28 July, George...
bodyText:
Gallery

CRICKET NEWS - On 27 and 28 July, George Cricket Club hosted an inaugural Business & Social Cricket league at their home field, Rooirivierrif, aimed at providing a platform for community members to take part in a social cricket structure and to raise some funds for the club.

PHOTO GALLERY: Business & Social Cricket league with George Cricket club

The format of the league is 8 players a side with matches of 12 overs per innings.


> The results of the first weekend of matches were as follows:


Sat 27 July

- Optimum Invitational (111/4) beat Veterans Invitational (108/7)
- Legal Leg Spinners (112/6) beat Ricoh Garden Route (86/6)
- Tekkie Town (90/3) beat Garden Route Radiology (89/1)

Sun 28 July

- Louvain vs Airvent Invitational (postponed)
- Legal Leg Spinners (62/1) beat Garden Route Radiology (61/5)
- Legal Leg Spinners (108/4) beat Tekkie Town (86/5)


> The next round of matches will be played on Saturday 3 August at the same venue.


Photos: Supplied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
